metadata.title: Initial release: consolidate 5 pm-preset-* packages into pm-presets
metadata.author: unknown

notes.author: unknown
notes.text:
2026-05-29 package-governance/readiness audit evidence.

Required package commands run from repo root: `npm run check`, `npm test`, `npm run pack:dry-run`, and `npm run changelog:check` all exited 0. Logs: `/tmp/pm-package-governance-audit-20260529-npm.log`; summary: `/tmp/pm-package-governance-audit-20260529-npm-summary.tsv`.

Temporary pm workspace flow: `pm init`, `pm install /home/steve/container/pm-packages/pm-presets --project`, and `pm package doctor --detail deep --trace` all exited 0. Doctor reported status ok, one active managed extension, and command paths `triage-setup`, `indie-setup`, `oss-setup`, `sprint-setup`, and `roadmap-setup`.

Preset setup flow by preset: for bug-triage, indie-dev, open-source, software-sprint, and startup-roadmap, `pm <preset>-setup --dry-run --prefix <audit-prefix>` and `pm <preset>-setup --force --prefix <audit-prefix>` exited 0. Immediately after apply, expected settings prefix/governance and template files were present.

Functional blocker: the next realistic `pm create --template ... --title ... --description ...` failed for all five presets. Without the bundled templates package installed, create exited 2 with `--template requires the templates package`; this contradicts the README next-step examples, which do not mention `pm install templates --project`. After installing `templates`, create still failed: bug-triage/open-source/software-sprint/startup-roadmap reported invalid template options payload; indie-dev hit `settings_read_invalid_schema` and then a pm CLI module load error for an OpenTelemetry dependency. No items were created.

Observed settings issue: each preset writes a partial `settings.json` that is accepted by the setup command but rejected by the current pm settings schema on the next pm command (`warning:settings_read_invalid_schema`). The workspace then falls back to default `id_prefix: pm-` and `governance.preset: minimal`, losing the applied preset settings. This is the main readiness blocker.

Governance: GitHub repo `unbraind/pm-presets` is PUBLIC, unarchived, default branch `main`, latest release `v2026.05.29-1` published 2026-05-29T21:23:06Z. npm package `pm-presets` latest is `2026.5.29-1`, repository points at `github.com/unbraind/pm-presets`.

Migration/deprecation recommendation: keep `pm-presets` as the only active preset distribution, but do not promote it as release-ready until setup writes schema-valid settings and templates create valid items with the documented commands. Legacy `pm-preset-*` repos should remain deprecated/frozen or archived after consumers have migrated.

Secret/private-data scan: tracked files and git history were scanned with path-only output for private-key headers, common cloud/GitHub/npm/OpenAI/Slack/Stripe/SendGrid token shapes, generic secret assignments, email literals, and local private host markers. No matches were found. Scan summary: `/tmp/pm-package-governance-audit-20260529-secret-scan.tsv` (empty/no matches).

Write hygiene: no source, package metadata, workflows, or docs were intentionally changed. An npm-driven run dirtied package metadata during verification; it was restored to HEAD. Final remaining changes are limited to `.agents/pm` tracker files.

notes.author: unknown
notes.text: 2026-05-29 follow-up implementation: fixed readiness blockers found in the audit. pm-presets now merges schema-valid settings into the existing pm workspace, preserves telemetry settings instead of overwriting them, writes current stored create-template documents, and registers templates/templates list/templates show with action templates-show so pm create --template works after installing pm-presets alone. Removed unsupported custom typeOption payloads from preset templates and kept that detail in item body text. Verified with npm run check, npm run build, npm test, npm run pack:dry-run, and fresh real workspaces for all five setup commands creating items from every installed template followed by pm validate.

notes.author: unknown
notes.text: 2026-05-29 release-readiness refresh: package manifest/lock now target @unbrained/pm-cli >=2026.5.29 / ^2026.5.29 and pm-changelog ^2026.5.29-2 where applicable. Verified npm run check, npm test, npm run pack:dry-run, npm run audit:prod, npm run changelog:full, npm run changelog:check, npm run release:check, and pm validate. High-confidence worktree/history secret scan recorded no credential-shaped token findings for active package code; nonzero scan rows were classified as placeholders or vendored historical test data where applicable. Logs: /tmp/pm-active-package-gates-20260529.tsv, /tmp/pm-active-changelog-20260529.tsv, /tmp/pm-active-release-check-20260529.tsv, /tmp/pm-active-validate-20260529.tsv, /tmp/pm-active-secret-scan-20260529.tsv.
